name: Magic Reindeer Food
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together oatmeal and glitter.
2. Place some of the mixture into an empty small plastic bag.
3. On a heavy piece of paper, such as construction paper, write the following instructions in a 2 x 4 1/2-inch rectangle:
- MAGIC REINDEER FOOD
- On Christmas Eve, sprinkle the Magic Reindeer Food on your lawn. The magic glitter sparkling in the moonlight and the smell of oats will guide Rudolph to your house.
4. Fold the paper rectangle in half.
5. Staple it to the top of the plastic sleeve (bag) so that the reindeer food does not spill.
